title: Plans for the Future
text: Mona likes thinking about her future and making simple plans. She wants to improve herself and have a better life. She believes that planning helps her feel more confident and organized.

In the near future, Mona plans to learn a new language and find a better job. She knows that these goals will take time, but she is ready to work hard. Although the future is not always clear, she stays positive and motivated.
Having plans for the future gives Mona hope and direction in her daily life.

questions.question: Why does Mona like planning for the future?
questions.answer: Because it helps her feel confident and organized

questions.question: What does Mona want to improve?
What are Mona's future plans?
questions.answer: To learn a new language and find a better job

questions.question: Does Mona think her goals will be easy?
questions.answer: No, she knows they will take time

questions.question: How does Mona feel about the future?
What do plans for the future give Mona?
Why do you think Mona stays positive even though her goals take time?
questions.answer: Because she believes planning and hard work will help her reach a better future
